User.title: User
User.description: User preferences and settings and profile roles

dmrId.description: CCS7 DMR ID (7 digits starting with 214)

isApproved.description: Is user profile verified and approved

twoFactorVerified.description: Has 2FA been verified once to finalize setup

tsunamiMinSeverity.description: Minimum severity threshold for tsunami alerts

soundSettings.description: User custom sound synthesis alert mappings for severity levels

sosSettings.description: Custom color, sound and zoom mappings for APRS emergency and status codes

alertPrefs.description: Custom alert and threshold preferences for sismos, air quality, weather, and notifications

Station.title: Station
Station.description: Operator configured and owned radio stations/nodes (iGate, WX, Digipeater)

callsign.description: Callsign of the station including SSID

type.description: Type of station (iGate, Digipeater, WX, Mobile)

description.description: Short summary or description of station hardware

SystemConfig.title: SystemConfig
SystemConfig.description: Global system configuration, version, and maintenance status

changelog.description: Changes introduced in the current version

forceUpdate.description: Whether to force clients to update automatically

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the version was published

SOSConfig.title: SOSConfig
SOSConfig.description: Global SOS alert sound and map configuration shared by all operators

settings.description: Sound profile, frequency and visual styling for each APRS emergency code

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the SOS configuration was last updated

updatedBy.description: User email or callsign who modified the configurations

/users/{userId}/stations/{stationId}.description: Operator owned and configured APRS/WX radio stations

/system/sos_config.description: Shared SOS alert sound and map configuration
